## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hyperexponential and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, positioning, and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Positioning needs refinement: HX isn't a "better IDP" but a new approach focused on decision-making, not just data ingestion](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Content artifacts will be updated to shorter, more focused format for better LLM output](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard set up to track search performance and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Blog structure to be finalized, with categories aligned to content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

## Topics

### Content Positioning and Strategy

  - [IDP positioning needs adjustment: frame as outdated approach, contrast with HX's focus on decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Emphasize HX as purpose-built for insurance underwriting, not generic document processing](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Avoid promotional tone in informational content intros](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Consider "old way, new way" framing to differentiate from legacy IDP solutions](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Shorter artifacts being implemented for better LLM output](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Two software engineers available for custom pipeline adjustments if needed](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Voice and tone generally good, but avoid overly chatty style](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [New Looker dashboard connects Google Analytics and Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Tracks overall sessions, engaged sessions, landing page performance, and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Cohort report will measure GrowthX content performance vs. entire website](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [LLM referral report shows traffic from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google Gemini, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### Blog Structure and Categories

  - [Will keep content under main "blog" URL](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Considering featured thought leadership section + categorized articles below](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Need to finalize category structure, potentially aligning with content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking

  - [Using Scrunch to monitor HX visibility in LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Overall presence growing, appearing in top 65% of responses](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Tracking custom prompts based on audience persona](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to provide additional positioning details upstream of messaging pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Erik to share designer-generated featured images for review](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Aida to follow up on best practices for blog URL structure (category slugs)](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [GrowthX team to propose blog category suggestions aligned with content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Set up meeting between Mark (HX) and GrowthX team to discuss API integration and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/L33g58u8TjPxNBWnsecpN8NJnHyjFdom?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
